Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8016 "POLEPOSITION-8016" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Pole Position (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: The loading screen is from the Spectrum version
